name: agent-session-browser
description: Local-only CLI and web UI to browse, search, and filter AI coding agent sessions (Cursor, Claude Code, and extensible providers).
author: rewolf

scripts.install:all: cd packages/core && npm install && cd ../cli && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: npm run clean --prefix packages/core && npm run clean --prefix packages/cli && npm run clean --prefix packages/backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/core && npm run build --prefix packages/cli && npm run build --prefix packages/backend && npm run build --prefix packages/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build --prefix packages/core && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix packages/backend" "npm run dev --prefix packages/frontend"
scripts.test: npm run build --prefix packages/core && npm run test --prefix packages/core && npm run test --prefix packages/backend && npm run test --prefix packages/cli && npm run test --prefix packages/frontend
